title: One Last Breath
why_this_song: One Last Breath by Creed (2001) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "I'm six feet from the edge and I'm thinking"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Hold me now"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I'm six feet from the edge and I'm thinking"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I'm six feet from the edge and I'm thinking"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Maybe six feet ain't so far down"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I'm six feet from the edge and I'm thinking
Maybe six feet ain't so far down
Please come now, I think I'm falling
I'm holding on to all I think is safe
It seems I found the road to nowhere

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "feet" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "feet" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hold" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hold" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Please come now, I think I'm falling
Reflecting on all of my mistakes
Maybe six feet ain't so far down

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: It seems I found the road to nowhere

exercises.prompt_en: "One Last Breath" was released in 2001. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "One Last Breath" foi lançada em 2001. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "One Last Breath" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "One Last Breath" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
